allow: PowerShell(python -m compileall -q common etl_pipeline elt_pipeline synthetic dashboard analysis architecture_diagram.py; "compileall exit=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker --version 2>&1; docker compose version 2>&1; "--- daemon check ---"; docker ps 2>&1; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker compose build 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath build.log; "BUILD EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker compose build 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath build2.log; "BUILD EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker compose up -d 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath up.log | Select-Object -Last 40; "UP EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker run --rm --entrypoint sh bigdata-hive:4.0.0 -c 'echo HIVE_HOME=$HIVE_HOME; ls -d /opt/hive/lib /opt/hive/auxlib 2>/dev/null; ls /opt/hive/lib | grep -i postgres' 2>&1)
PowerShell("=== is the jar in the image? ===")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T spark-master python /app/etl_pipeline/extract.py 2>&1 | Select-String "source=|finished"; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T spark-master python /app/synthetic/train_ctgan.py --n 150000 --epochs 10 --seed 42 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath ctgan.log; "CTGAN EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -e USER=sparkuser -e HOME=/tmp -T spark-master python /app/synthetic/train_ctgan.py --n 150000 --epochs 10 --seed 42 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath ctgan.log; "CTGAN EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T spark-master spark-submit /app/etl_pipeline/transform.py 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath transform.log; "TRANSFORM EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -e HOME=/tmp -T spark-master spark-submit /app/etl_pipeline/transform.py 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath transform.log; "TRANSFORM EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T spark-master sh -c "id; getent passwd 1001; echo HOME=`$HOME" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T spark-master spark-submit /app/etl_pipeline/transform.py 2>&1 | Select-String "VALIDATION|Staging written|Transform finished" ; "TRANSFORM EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T spark-master spark-submit /app/etl_pipeline/load.py 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath load.log; "LOAD EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T spark-master getent hosts hive-metastore 2>&1)
PowerShell("`n=== networks of spark-master vs hive-metastore ===")
PowerShell(docker run --rm --user 0 --entrypoint sh -v bigdata-tubes_warehouse:/wh bigdata-spark:3.5 -c "chmod -R 777 /wh && ls -ld /wh && echo CHMOD_OK" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T spark-master spark-submit /app/etl_pipeline/load.py 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath load.log | Out-Null; "LOAD EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T spark-master spark-submit /app/elt_pipeline/extract_load.py 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath elt_load.log | Select-String "raw_credit|raw_macro|Extract\\+Load|Traceback|Exception|Error|Killed"; "ELT_LOAD EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
